entries.label: Open Repo ICICSO
entries.description: Abre la raiz real del repo ICICSO.

entries.label: Start Mockup Local
entries.description: Levanta el runtime local oficial del mockup.

entries.label: Run Start Mockup PS1
entries.description: Ejecuta directamente scripts/start-icicso-mockup.ps1.

entries.label: Prepare Mockup Build
entries.description: Prepara dependencias y build local del continuum.

entries.label: Run Continuum Doctor
entries.description: Diagnostica gateway, servicios, puertos y logs.

entries.label: Start Canon Emulator
entries.description: Levanta el canon emulator en 8098.

entries.label: Stop Mockup Local
entries.description: Detiene el runtime local del mockup.

entries.label: Stop Canon Emulator
entries.description: Detiene el canon emulator.

entries.label: Open START_HERE Repo
entries.description: Entrada documental principal del proyecto.

entries.label: Open SYSTEM_STATUS
entries.description: Estado real del sistema y de cada arbol.

entries.label: Open NEXT_ACTIONS
entries.description: Siguiente capa de trabajo priorizada.

entries.label: Open Local Development Runbook
entries.description: Guia operativa y de desarrollo local.

entries.label: Open AUDIT_REPORT
entries.description: Auditoria general del repo.

entries.label: Open SYSTEM_MAP
entries.description: Mapa real de topologia y ownership.

entries.label: Open CLEANUP_DECISIONS
entries.description: Decisiones tomadas durante limpieza y depuracion.

entries.label: Open MODULE_CLASSIFICATION
entries.description: Clasificacion de modulos y estado real.

entries.label: Open Mockup Dashboard
entries.description: Abre el dashboard oficial del mockup local.

entries.label: Open Canon Emulator
entries.description: Abre el canon emulator oficial.

entries.label: Open Gateway Health
entries.description: Abre el health del gateway real del mockup.

entries.label: Open Block1 Overview
entries.description: Abre la vista base del caso desde el gateway.

entries.label: Open Useful Logs Folder
entries.description: Abre la carpeta de logs del runtime mockup.

entries.label: Open Docker Compose Source
entries.description: Abre el compose oficial del runtime local.

entries.label: Open Evidence Assets
entries.description: Abre la carpeta de evidencia local del repo.
